title: brownfield inventory — output of /scan
description: Output of /scan in the brownfield agent. Enumerates every artifact in the source solution by platform + artifactType + instance. Consumed by /document (per-artifact doc generation), /handoff (for downstream agents in brownfield mode), and solution-estimate (for brownfield multipliers). See design/agents/brownfield.md.

sources.description: Input source files/folders that contributed to this scan (paths under _brownfield/input/).

detectedModules.description: Modules detected by module-detection.yaml. Bindings with requires: module:<x> are silent-skipped when their module isn't in this list.

^(d365-ce|d365-fo|integration|reporting|.description: Per-platform inventory. Key by artifact type; value is an array of instances.

name.description: Logical name of this instance (e.g., entity name, plugin class name)

sourceRef.description: Evidence chain: file:line or zip-path that this instance was extracted from. Required by validate_evidence_chain.

module.description: Module classification. If a binding requires a module gate, this field determines whether the binding processes this instance.

brownfieldStatus.description: Brownfield component classification used by solution-estimate multipliers per ADR-0009. NEW = full effort (×1.0), EXTEND = partial (×0.6), REPLACE = removal + replacement (×1.15), REFERENCED = no implementation (×0.0). Defaults to N/A in greenfield mode.

metadata.description: Free-form artifact-specific metadata extracted by the binding's extractors (e.g., for an entity: fields, relationships, keys, plugin-steps).
